title: Soulection White Label: 003
content:
Meet our latest discovery, Jarreau Vandal (pronounced Juh-Row) all the way from Amsterdam!

Jarreau is by far one of the most talented artists that we've discovered in recent times and through none other than IAMNOBODI after the two of them met at a show. Jarreau sent IAMNOBODI a folder of unreleased beats (including some of the tracks on this White Label) and was blown away! Jarreau's production is very mature and ahead of time and we truly feel that he could be next blow. Keep your eyes and ears open for plenty of more music to come from Jarreau and Soulection.
